name: @ichiflow/portal
description: Phase 4.4 first Portal — the back-office audience-scoped surface (doc 07 §5): a PDP-filtered, SLA-ordered Task inbox + a Case/review view (decision-trace, an action form that signals the Flow, obligation checklist, field-level entitlements). React, runnable headless under jsdom; its deterministic preview harness produces the machine-readable result the `portal` verify scope reads.
